messages.content: {{SYSTEM}}
I forgot what I was saying.
No worries, happens to all of us. What was the topic?
{{SYSTEM}}
Remind me of a time we laughed.
Haha, fond memories are the best. What's on your mind?
{{SYSTEM}}
The news is always depressing.
Feels that way sometimes. Want to talk about something lighter?
{{SYSTEM}}
Schedule my life for me.
If only that were a real option. What's actually on your plate?
{{SYSTEM}}
The weather of my mood has been stormy lately.
That sounds rough. Want to talk about it?
{{SYSTEM}}
Convert my doubts into certainty.
Wish I could. What's eating at you?
{{SYSTEM}}
Search your wisdom and share it.
Ha, flattering. Hit me with a specific question and I'll try.
{{SYSTEM}}
Save me from this boredom.
Let's fix that. What sounds fun right now?
{{SYSTEM}}
Graph out how my day went.
Verbal version works too — how'd it go?
{{SYSTEM}}
Call up some happy memories.
Got a specific one in mind? I love hearing the good stuff.
